name: trips_unified
description: Canonical, lossless union of every Citibike trip era. Superset of the legacy (<=2021) and current (>=2021) CSV layouts; era-specific fields are NULL where the source did not provide them. Produced by src/citibike_pipeline/load_bigquery.py and mirrored in sql/trips_unified.sql.

columns.name: ride_id
columns.note: current-era hash id; NULL for legacy (do not synthesize)

columns.name: rideable_type
columns.note: classic_bike|electric_bike|docked_bike; NULL for legacy (inferable from bike_id via BikeTypes.md)

columns.name: trip_duration_seconds
columns.note: legacy: explicit trip_duration (seconds); current: TIMESTAMP_DIFF(stop_time, start_time, SECOND)

columns.name: start_station_id
columns.note: STRING covers both eras (legacy integer ids and current alphanumeric like HB102)

columns.name: birth_year
columns.note: NULL for current era (removed for privacy)

columns.name: distance_meters
columns.note: ST_DISTANCE between start and end station geopoints

columns.name: source_file
columns.note: GCS Parquet object the row was read from (_FILE_NAME pseudo-column)
